identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a 'Digital Ledger' aesthetic that blends Swiss precision with high-end financial luxury. Break the boring 'tax portal' stereotype.
principles: Fusion: Swiss Typography x Luxury Fintech
Content is King: Data is the art
Zoom in: Focus on the details (signatures, numbers)

usage.headings: Use 'Playfair Display' for all H1-H3. It conveys the 'Certificate' authority. Weight: SemiBold (600) or Bold (700).
usage.body: Use 'Manrope' for UI elements, labels, and general text. It's modern and legible.
usage.data: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL financial figures, tables, and dates. This is non-negotiable for alignment and precision.

primary.description: Deep Emerald Green - Represents Wealth, Stability, and Growth.

secondary.description: Bronze/Gold - Represents the 'Certificate' seal and premium quality.

usage_rules: Use Deep Emerald for primary actions (Buttons, Active States).
Use Bronze/Gold sparingly for accents (Icons, Borders, 'Premium' badges).
Backgrounds should be 'Paper White' (#F8FAFC) in light mode to mimic high-quality stationery.
Dark mode should use 'Deep Charcoal' (#0F172A), not pure black.

grid_system.marketing: Mode A: The Tetris Grid. Asymmetric layouts for the landing page.
grid_system.dashboard: Mode B: The Control Room. Dense, data-heavy grids for the forms and history.

spacing.base: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. Gap-6 or Gap-8 for grids.

containers.glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 shadow-lg (Use for sticky headers or overlays)

buttons.style: Sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-md). Avoid fully pill-shaped buttons unless for tags.

inputs.classes: h-12 rounded-md border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

cards.style: Clean, white (or dark surface) with a subtle 1px border. No massive drop shadows. Let the content breathe.

tables.style: Zebra striping is banned. Use simple bottom borders for rows. Header text should be uppercase and small (text-xs tracking-wider).
tables.font: JetBrains Mono for all cell data.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle 'noise' or 'grain' texture on the background to give it a paper-like feel.
visual_enhancers.decorations: Use thin, elegant lines (1px) to separate sections. Think 'Architectural Blueprint'.
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (Thin or Light weight) to match the elegant typography.

hero_bg.description: Minimalist white room abstract. Use as a subtle background for the Hero section with low opacity or overlay.

feature_action.description: Person writing on notepad. Use for the 'Easy Form Filling' feature section.

premium_feel.description: Black fountain pen on white paper. Use for the 'Professional Output' or 'CA Certified' section.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building a tool for professionals. It must feel reliable and fast. Do not add unnecessary animations that slow down the workflow.
instructions_to_main_agent.landing_page: Create a high-converting landing page. Use the 'Tetris' grid. Hero section should clearly offer the two choices: 'Net Worth Certificate' and 'Turnover Certificate'.
instructions_to_main_agent.dashboard: The dashboard is the workspace. Keep it clean. Use a sidebar for navigation (New Certificate, History, Settings).
instructions_to_main_agent.forms: Break the long forms (5 years of data) into logical sections or steps. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all input fields expecting numbers.
instructions_to_main_agent.preview: The certificate preview must look EXACTLY like a paper document. Use a white container with a subtle drop shadow centered on a gray background.
instructions_to_main_agent.print: Ensure the print styles (@media print) hide the sidebar, buttons, and other UI elements, leaving only the certificate.
instructions_to_main_agent.tech_stack: Use React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI components. Customize Shadcn to match the 'E1' aesthetic (Radius: 0.5rem, Font: Manrope).
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for overlays.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
